since_last: 39% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.58%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -2.15% · Gold +0.48% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 39% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.58%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.58%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +36.28%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +36.28%, AMAT +2.48%, LRCX +2.10%, CGNX +1.81%, CRNC +1.38%. Laggards: DLR -4.24%, TTD -4.02%, FTNT -1.72%, TSLA -1.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.32% at $163.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
